title: How Fed Pick Warsh Survived Trump’s Ultimate Reality Show
title_cn: 美联储人选沃什如何挺过特朗普的终极真人秀

paragraphs.cn: 美国东部时间2026年1月30日晚9:00

paragraphs.en: WASHINGTON—When Kevin Warsh showed up at Mar-a-Lago to interview with Donald Trump shortly after the president-elect’s campaign victory in November 2024, Trump expressed surprise that Warsh was interested in being considered for Treasury secretary.
paragraphs.cn: 华盛顿——2024年11月，当选总统特朗普竞选胜利后不久，凯文·沃什出现在海湖庄园与特朗普会面时，特朗普对沃什有意被考虑担任财政部长一职表示惊讶。

paragraphs.en: “You’re my Fed chair,” Trump told him, Warsh later recounted to an associate. For months, Warsh had been making similar comments to new acquaintances and longtime confidants alike: The job would eventually be his.
paragraphs.cn: “你将是我的美联储主席，”特朗普告诉他，沃什后来向一位同事回忆道。数月来，沃什一直向新认识的人和老朋友发表类似的评论：这个职位最终会是他的。

paragraphs.en: It would take 14 months, a reality-television-style public audition, a bitter behind-the-scenes campaign, and a criminal investigation of the sitting Fed chair before that prediction came true. On Friday morning, Trump announced he would nominate Warsh to succeed Jerome Powell as chair of the Federal Reserve, capping one of the most public personnel contests of Trump’s second term.
paragraphs.cn: 在这个预言成真之前，需要14个月的时间，一场真人秀式的公开面试，一场激烈的幕后竞选，以及对现任美联储主席的刑事调查。周五上午，特朗普宣布他将提名沃什接替杰罗姆·鲍威尔担任美联储主席，这标志着特朗普第二任期最公开的人事竞争之一的结束。

paragraphs.en: “President Trump’s exhaustive and thorough selection process for the next Fed Chairman was accordingly guided by the sole consideration of who can best step in and restore confidence in Federal Reserve decision-making,” White House spokesman Kush Desai said in a statement.
paragraphs.cn: 白宫发言人库什·德赛在一份声明中表示：“特朗普总统对下一任美联储主席的详尽而彻底的遴选过程，完全以谁能最好地介入并恢复对美联储决策的信心为唯一考量。”

paragraphs.en:
